ResponseBody.description: Code interpreter agent for data analysis and visualization.

RequestBody.input: Could you please create bar chart in TRANSPORTATION sector for the operating profit from the uploaded csv file and provide file to me?

output.code:
import pandas as pd

# Load the CSV file
file_path = '/mnt/data/assistant-L4Cma4hFNbgKQavwk7VDBj-synthetic_500_quarterly_results.csv'
data = pd.read_csv(file_path)

# Display the first few rows of the dataframe to understand its structure
data.head()

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

# Filter the data for the TRANSPORTATION sector
transportation_data = data[data['sector'] == 'TRANSPORTATION']

# Convert operating profit to a numeric type
transportation_data['operating_profit'] = pd.to_numeric(transportation_data['operating_profit'], errors='coerce')

# Create a bar chart for operating profit in the TRANSPORTATION sector
plt.figure(figsize=(12, 6))
plt.bar(transportation_data['name'], transportation_data['operating_profit'], color='skyblue')
plt.xticks(rotation=45, ha='right')
plt.title('Operating Profit in the TRANSPORTATION Sector')
plt.xlabel('Company Name')
plt.ylabel('Operating Profit')
plt.tight_layout()

# Save the plot to a file
bar_chart_path = '/mnt/data/transportation_operating_profit_chart.png'
plt.savefig(bar_chart_path)

bar_chart_path

content.text:
The bar chart for operating profit in the TRANSPORTATION sector has been created.
